message.content:
@startuml
skinparam actorStyle shapeActor
skinparam interfaceStyle shapeInterface
skinparam lifelineStyle shapeLifeline

actor ユーザ as UserActor
interface web.php as WebInterface

lifeline ブラウザ as Browser
lifeline web.php as WebPHP
lifeline Kouka1_1Controller as Controller
lifeline Kouka1_1.index.blade.php as Blade1
lifeline layout.kouka1_1.blade.php as Layout
lifeline components.menu.blade.php as Menu
lifeline components.subview.blade.php as SubView

UserActor ..|.. ブラウザ : GET[/kouka1_1]

Browser ..|.. WebPHP : @index

WebPHP ..|.. Controller : @extends

Controller ..|.. Blade1 : @extends

Blade1 ..|.. Layout : @component

Layout ..|.. Menu : @include

Menu ..|.. SubView : @include

@enduml
